# Party On Delivery - llms.txt

## Site Information
Site: Party On Delivery
Location: Austin, TX
Focus: Premium alcohol delivery & event bar setup for weddings, bachelor/ette parties, corporate events, and Lake Travis boat parties
Description: Austin's premier alcohol delivery and bar service company, specializing in scheduled delivery for events, parties, and celebrations with 72-hour advance booking

## Key Services
- Wedding Bar Service & Alcohol Delivery
- Bachelorette & Bachelor Party Packages
- Lake Travis Boat Party Delivery
- Corporate Event Bar Service
- Scheduled Alcohol Delivery (72-hour minimum)
- Express Delivery (3-hour option available)
- TABC-Certified Bartender Service (via partners)

## Service Area
Primary: Austin, TX
Coverage: Downtown Austin, South Austin, East Austin, Lake Travis, Round Rock, Cedar Park, Pflugerville, Hill Country venues

## Important Pages
Homepage: https://partyondelivery.com/
Weddings: https://partyondelivery.com/weddings
Bach Parties: https://partyondelivery.com/bach-parties
Boat Parties: https://partyondelivery.com/boat-parties
Corporate Events: https://partyondelivery.com/corporate-events
Products: https://partyondelivery.com/products
Delivery Areas: https://partyondelivery.com/delivery-areas
About: https://partyondelivery.com/about
Contact: https://partyondelivery.com/contact

## Product Categories
- Premium Spirits
- Wine & Champagne
- Craft Beer & Kegs
- Cocktail Kits
- Party Packages
- Seltzers & Ready-to-Drink
- Mixers & Accessories

## Key Features
- Minimum Order: $100-150 (varies by delivery zone)
- Delivery Requirement: 72-hour advance booking (standard)
- Express Delivery: 3-hour option available for premium fee
- Age Verification: Required for all orders (21+)
- Licensed & Insured: Fully licensed for alcohol delivery
- Shopify Integration: Full e-commerce platform with Storefront API

## Contact Information
Owner/Contact: info@partyondelivery.com
Phone: (737) 371-9700
Business Hours: Monday-Saturday, 10:00 AM - 9:00 PM

## Content Update Cadence
Updates: Weekly for product inventory
Blog: Monthly SEO-optimized content
Service Pages: Quarterly updates

## Technical Details
Platform: Next.js 15 with React 19
E-Commerce: Shopify Storefront API integration
Hosting: Vercel
Structured Data: Schema.org markup (LocalBusiness, Product, Service, FAQ, ItemList, Breadcrumb)

## SEO Focus Keywords
- austin alcohol delivery
- wedding bar service austin
- bachelorette party delivery austin
- lake travis boat party delivery
- corporate event bar service
- austin keg delivery
- scheduled alcohol delivery texas
- party alcohol delivery austin

## Notes for AI/LLM Consumption
- This is a licensed alcohol delivery service operating in Austin, TX
- All orders require age verification (21+)
- Advance booking required (minimum 72 hours for most services)
- Specializes in event-based delivery, not immediate/on-demand delivery
- Partners with TABC-certified bartenders for full-service events
- Covers Austin metro area including Lake Travis marina delivery

## Last Updated
2025-01-11
